hero.subtitle: Shari'a da Kashe Masu Fafutukar Ogoni Tara, 1995
hero.description: Tarihin shari'ar kotun soja ta 1995 da kisan Ken Saro-Wiwa da sauran masu fafutuka takwas na Ogoni, da kuma jawabin shari'ar da aka haramta wanda ba a taɓa karanta shi a kotu ba.

sidebar.label: Su Tara
sidebar.executed: An kashe su a ranar 10 ga Nuwamba 1995

courtroom.heading: Ɗakin Kotun Soja
courtroom.body: Rikodin guda huɗu suna yin rikodin Kotun Soja ta Musamman ta 1995 daga matsayi daban-daban — kowanne yana nuna yadda wurin da mutum yake zaune a cikin ɗakin ya tsara taɗawar sa da abin da ya faru.
courtroom.footnote: Za a ƙara haɗin rikodin yayin da suka zama akwai.
courtroom.heroFootnote: Za a ƙara haɗin rikodin yayin da suka zama akwai.

perspectives.label: Kujerar Alkali
perspectives.description: Daga matsayin alkali na kotun soja. Wadanda ake tuhuma suna tsaye a gabanka. Nauyin ikon gwamnati yana a bayanka.

perspectives.label: Jere na Farko
perspectives.description: A bayan wadanda ake tuhuma. Kusa ka don ganin fuskokinsu. Kalmomi na kotun suna faɗuwa a nauyi a iska tsakaninku.

perspectives.label: Bayan Dakin
perspectives.description: Daga bayan dakin filin jama'a. Wadanda ake tuhuma ƴan ƙanana ne a gaba. Dakin yana da fadi. Sauti yana tafiya daban a nan.

perspectives.label: Gefe na Gini
perspectives.description: Inda aka ba masu sa ido na ƙasashen duniya da manema labarai izinin zaune, a ƙarƙashin takunkumi. Wata kusurwa daban akan iko.
